panels.title: Archive Resolution Eval Runner
paragraphs: Current local status: 6 hard tasks, status_counts: satisfied=6. The tasks are satisfied against committed fixture-backed evidence and strict local checks.
This means the regression harness currently recognizes source-backed candidate shapes. It does not mean broad archive search or production relevance is solved.

panels.title: Search Usefulness Audit
paragraphs: Current local status: 64 queries, with 5 covered, 22 partial, 26 source gaps, 9 capability gaps, and 2 unknown.
Dominant failure modes still include source coverage, compatibility evidence, planner, query interpretation, representation, decomposition, and member-access gaps.

panels.title: Manual External Baselines
paragraphs: Google Web Search, Internet Archive metadata search, and Internet Archive full-text/OCR search remain pending/manual. Global slots: 192 pending and 0 observed. Batch 0: 39 pending and 0 observed.
No external baseline observations are fabricated or automated. Comparison reports should wait for human-entered records.

panels.title: Hard Test Pack
paragraphs: Hardening tests guard path leakage, route inventory drift, external baseline honesty, source placeholder honesty, eval hardness, and docs/command drift.
